arts.ttl: “More dominant than Real Madrid or Barca” – Leeds United player on club’s Championship superiority
arts.sum: Leeds United have been more dominant with their playing style in the Championship than Real Madrid and Barcelona in La Liga. That’s according to Leeds’ Junior Firpo, and he compared Leeds to Real Madrid and Barca during a chat with Marca.
